case_title: GARY A. BELAGA, M.D. VS. GENERAL EMPLOYEES TRUST FUND et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT GENERAL EMPLOYEES TRUST FUND THE UNION LABOR LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY NORTHWEST ADMINISTRATORS, INC.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY BELAGA, M.D., GARY A. AS TO DEFENDANT GENERAL EMPLOYEES TRUST FUND THE UNION LABOR LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-15-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 AS TO DEFENDANT GENERAL EMPLOYEES TRUST FUND THE UNION LABOR LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY NORTHWEST ADMINISTRATORS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-15-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-19-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NORTHWEST ADMINISTRATORS, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BELAGA, M.D., GARY A. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GENERAL EMPLOYEES TRUST FUND THE UNION LABOR LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY NORTHWEST ADMINISTRATORS, INC. THE COURT FINDS THAT DOCTOR BELAGA RENDERED MEDICALLY NECESSARY TREATMENT TO LILIANA CASTRO, HOWEVER, HE DOES NOT HAVE STANDING TO PURSUE THIS CLAIM ON HER BEHALF UNDER 29 USC 1132(A). EACH PARTY TO BEAR HIS/ITS OWN COST. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR FILED BY WALTER PENTZ FOR THE DEFENDANT(S): GENERAL EMPLOYEES TRUST FUND & NORTHWEST ADMINISTRATORS, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-11-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT THE UNION LABOR LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-15-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-15-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHELE MCGILL. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS RETAINED FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-15-2008 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
